data.title: CoStar Data Shows Midlands Big-Box Market Reaches Turning Point as Supply Starts to Fall
data.description: In the Midlands, big-box warehouse supply is decreasing post the peak at the beginning of the year, as reported by CoStar. The data reveals a drop of approximately 5 million square feet in availability recently. This decline is attributed to increasing demand from occupants and a slowing construction pipeline, marking a shift from the previous trend of rising supply. Although there has been a decrease, the supply levels are still considered historically high in the region.

data.title: Canadian and German A.I. start-ups merge as Cohere acquires Aleph Alpha, challenging Silicon Valley's dominance in artificial intelligence.
data.description: Cohere is set to acquire Aleph Alpha in a strategic deal to address concerns among customers regarding the significant presence of American firms in artificial intelligence. This acquisition involves a substantial investment and marks a significant move in the AI sector. The deal is structured to provide a competitive edge in the market and cater to customers seeking alternatives to the dominance of American companies in AI.

data.title: Blancpain-Imaginist Literary Prize 2026 with Its Annual Theme Being The Decisive Moment of Literature Launches
data.description: The 9th edition of the Blancpain-Imaginist Literary Prize commenced on April 15, 2026, in Beijing. Submissions are welcomed by the organizing committee until May 15. Publishing houses and authors are encouraged to submit their literary works for consideration within this time frame.

data.title: ASE Holdings Hosts Annual Supplier Day to Recognize Outstanding Suppliers of 2025
data.description: In Taichung, Taiwan, ASE Technology Holding Co., Ltd. (ASE Holdings) held its Supplier Day, honoring partners and awarding top suppliers of 2025. This event, themed 'Innovation of Synergy,' brought together representatives from 100+ suppliers of ASE subsidiaries - ASE, SPIL, and USI. Listed on NYSE as ASX and TAIEX as 3711, ASE Holdings recognized the vital contributions of its partners in driving technology innovation and knowledge.

data.title: Sovereign AI for the World: Cohere and Aleph Alpha to Form Global AI Powerhouse as Nations and Enterprises Demand Control Over Their Technology
data.description: In a recent development, Cohere and Aleph Alpha, two leading sovereign AI providers catering to governments and regulated industries, have revealed their intention to merge. This strategic collaboration aims to leverage Cohere’s expansive global AI capabilities alongside Aleph Alpha’s significant research prowess and established institutional networks. By uniting their strengths, the two entities seek to create a powerful AI entity with a competitive edge on a global scale, supported by their respective Canadian and German ecosystems. The merger signifies a mutual goal of offering cutting-edge AI solutions to meet the needs of a worldwide audience.

data.title: Hyundai Motor Reaffirms China Commitment at Auto China 2026, Unveils IONIQ V as First Step in New Product Offensive
data.description: Hyundai Motor is implementing an updated strategy in China with a focus on their "In China, For China, To Global" approach. The IONIQ V has been introduced as the inaugural dedicated IONIQ production model for China, designed to cater to the preferences and demands of local customers. China has been identified as a key center for electric vehicle (EV) advancement and innovation.

data.title: American Council of Learned Societies Announces 2026 Awardees of the Graduate Internships on the Spiritual Infrastructure of the Future Program
data.description: 10 promising scholars of religion will receive support for summer internships and professional development through a program launched by the American Council of Learned Societies (ACLS). The initiative aims to assist emerging scholars in advancing their careers. The recipients will be provided with opportunities for practical experience and skill development. The ACLS recently announced the selection of the first group of awardees for the Graduate Internships on the Spiritual program on April 24, 2026, in New York. This marks the beginning of a new initiative to nurture talent in the field of religion and provide valuable resources to scholars.

data.title: Supplement to the notice of the annual general meeting issued on 7 April 2026
data.description: The announcement for the annual general meeting scheduled for April 29, 2026, was released on April 7, 2026. The notice highlights that details regarding the election of board members, including the chairman and deputy chairmen as per item 5 on the agenda, will be disclosed later.
